senses.gloss: to be few, to be little
to become few, to become little

examples.text: .الطائرة التي كانت قد اقلعت متوجهة الى كيفو وكانت تقل عشرات الاشخاص
examples.english: The plane which had started in direction to Kivu carried tens of persons.

etymology.text: From the root ق ل ل (q l l), from which also قَلِيل (qalīl).
